_comment: Ryujin Keep rift dragon (gates the Dragon gym leader on the dragon_slain tag). riftAnchor = where the rift tears open and the dragon emerges (showrunner: ~2267/343/963 above town). fightOrigin = the point the dragon CIRCLES and lands at (its flight anchor — the fight happens IN TOWN, so keep this near keep/plaza level; TODO(showrunner): confirm the exact spot + Y). crystals = end-crystal positions that heal the dragon (+2 HP/s from the nearest within 32 blocks of it) — the kill-the-crystals loop; TODO(showrunner): move these onto built pillar tops around the fight area. healthMultiplier tunes the 200 HP base down for hardcore fairness (0.5 = 100 HP).
